title: prostanthera lasiangustata
intro: Prostanthera lasiangustata, also known as the narrow-leaved lavender bush, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is a medicinal plant with anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant's essential oils are commonly used to relieve stress, promote relaxation, and soothe digestive issues, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. In herbal preparations, Prostanthera lasiangustata is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
